passes: dead compatibility helpers and naming residue are removed without behavior drift
canvas live source no longer depends on adjustment-shaped view models or adjustment-shaped default state constructors
preset authored data and preset consumers use canonical renderState only
src/render/image ingress and adjacent runtime helpers no longer compile or depend on old adjustments-shaped inputs
film/profile resolution is state-native and resolved runtime profiles are v3-only with no legacy-v1 mode
remaining historical tails are removed or renamed so live source no longer depends on stock-v1 wrappers, Asset.group fallback, browser BYOK cleanup, or legacy IndexedDB runtime/index fallbacks
